_meta.description: Synthetic market intelligence data for the Groupon AI Deal Creator prototype. In production, this would pull from Groupon's actual deal performance database.
_meta.data_source: Synthetic - based on assumed industry benchmarks

waxing.name: Waxing
fine_print_templates: New customers only. By appointment only. Valid [days]. Limit 1 per person. Not valid with other offers. Gratuity not included.
Valid for new clients only. Must book appointment in advance. Expires 90 days after purchase.

eyelash_services.name: Eyelash Services
title_patterns: Lash Lift and Tint at [Business] (Up to X% Off)
Full Set of Eyelash Extensions at [Business]
fine_print_templates: New customers only. Patch test may be required 48 hours before appointment. By appointment only. Limit 1 per person.
Valid for new clients only. Must book appointment in advance. Expires 90 days after purchase. Not valid with other offers.

chicago.market_size: Large - high density of beauty businesses

bundle_performance.description: Bundles outperform single services by 25% in purchase volume

scheduling_insights.description: Tuesday/Wednesday deals fill 40% more slots than weekend-only deals

top_performing_price_range.description: Deals priced $30-$60 have the highest conversion rate in Beauty & Spas

assumptions.assumption: 35-40% discount is optimal for beauty/spa services in Chicago
assumptions.basis: Industry average for beauty category on deal platforms
assumptions.impact_if_wrong: Merchants may see lower volume (too shallow) or margin loss (too deep)
assumptions.validation: A/B test discount recommendations by subcategory

assumptions.basis: Common marketplace pattern - higher perceived value drives conversion
assumptions.impact_if_wrong: Bundle recommendations may not lift performance as expected
assumptions.validation: Compare bundle vs single service deal performance in production data

assumptions.assumption: Midweek deals fill more slots for appointment-based businesses
assumptions.basis: Appointment businesses have lower midweek utilization, Groupon drives incremental traffic
assumptions.impact_if_wrong: Scheduling recommendations may not match merchant availability
assumptions.validation: Analyze redemption patterns by day of week

assumptions.assumption: $30-$60 is the sweet spot for Beauty & Spas conversion
assumptions.basis: Consumer price sensitivity research on deal platforms
assumptions.impact_if_wrong: Price recommendations may push merchants outside their optimal range
assumptions.validation: Analyze conversion rate by deal price bucket
